mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.product_subname, p.summary, p.status, p.is_featured, p.travel_type, p.min_people, p.max_people, p.price_per_person, p.video_path, p.video_url, p.transport_type, p.has_shopping, p.has_guide_fee, p.has_escort, p.has_optional_tour, p.departure_location, p.departure_at, p.arrival_location, p.arrival_at, p.hashtags, (COALESCE(p.reserved_count, 0) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.adult_count + b.child_count + b.infant_count), 0) FROM bookings b WHERE b.product_id = p.product_id AND b.status IN ('PENDING','CONFIRMED'))) AS reserved_count, (COALESCE(p.confirmed_count, 0) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.adult_count + b.child_count + b.infant_count), 0) FROM bookings b WHERE b.product_id = p.product_id AND b.status = 'CONFIRMED')) AS confirmed_count, p.exposure_end_at, p.created_at, thumb.image_path AS thumbnail_path, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id) AS image_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_files pf WHERE pf.product_id = p.product_id) AS file_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN categories root ON ( (c.depth = 1 AND c.category_id = root.category_id) OR (c.depth = 2 AND c.parent_id = root.category_id) ) LEFT JOIN product_images thumb ON thumb.product_id = p.product_id AND thumb.image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.is_active = 'Y' AND root.category_name = #{categoryName} AND root.depth = 1 ORDER BY p.is_featured DESC, p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.product_subname, p.summary, p.description, p.status, p.is_featured, p.travel_type, p.min_people, p.max_people, p.price_per_person, p.video_path, p.video_url, p.transport_type, p.has_shopping, p.has_guide_fee, p.has_escort, p.has_optional_tour, p.departure_location, p.departure_at, p.arrival_location, p.arrival_at, p.hashtags, (COALESCE(p.reserved_count, 0) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.adult_count + b.child_count + b.infant_count), 0) FROM bookings b WHERE b.product_id = p.product_id AND b.status IN ('PENDING','CONFIRMED'))) AS reserved_count, (COALESCE(p.confirmed_count, 0) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.adult_count + b.child_count + b.infant_count), 0) FROM bookings b WHERE b.product_id = p.product_id AND b.status = 'CONFIRMED')) AS confirmed_count, p.exposure_start_at, p.exposure_end_at, p.created_at, thumb.image_path AS thumbnail_path, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_images pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id) AS image_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_files pf WHERE pf.product_id = p.product_id) AS file_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN product_images thumb ON thumb.product_id = p.product_id AND thumb.image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.is_active = 'Y'

SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, root.category_name AS root_category_name, p.product_name, p.product_subname, p.summary, p.status, p.is_featured, p.travel_type, p.price_per_person, p.transport_type, p.departure_location, p.departure_at, p.arrival_location, p.arrival_at, p.hashtags, (COALESCE(p.reserved_count, 0) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.adult_count + b.child_count + b.infant_count), 0) FROM bookings b WHERE b.product_id = p.product_id AND b.status IN ('PENDING','CONFIRMED'))) AS reserved_count, (COALESCE(p.confirmed_count, 0) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.adult_count + b.child_count + b.infant_count), 0) FROM bookings b WHERE b.product_id = p.product_id AND b.status = 'CONFIRMED')) AS confirmed_count, p.created_at, thumb.image_path AS thumbnail_path FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN categories root ON ( (c.depth = 1 AND c.category_id = root.category_id) OR (c.depth = 2 AND c.parent_id = root.category_id) ) LEFT JOIN product_images thumb ON thumb.product_id = p.product_id AND thumb.image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.is_active = 'Y' AND root.depth = 1 AND ( p.product_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.product_subname ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.summary ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.hashtags ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR root.category_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR c.category_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.arrival_location ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY p.is_featured DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, product_id, image_path, image_type, sort_order, created_at FROM product_images WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY image_type DESC, sort_order ASC
SELECT id, product_id, file_path, file_name, file_type, file_size, sort_order, created_at FROM product_files WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
